name: Basic Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the baking chocolate in a double boiler.
2. Stir in the butter, then boiling water.
3. Add sugar and salt, stirring occasionally for 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
The sauce is best when served warm. Either serve immediately or reheat gently in a double boiler for 10 minutes or in a microwave for 1 minute. To store, pour into sterilized glass jars. Allow the sauce to cool before refrigerating. It will keep for 6 months in the refrigerator.
Variations:
Add any of the following flavorings in place of or in addition to the vanilla:
- 1 teaspoon orange extract or 1/3 cup orange juice
- 1 teaspoon mint extract
- 1/8 cup crushed strawberries or raspberries, chopped raisins or nuts
- 1 tablespoon Creme de Menthe, coffee liqueur, spice orange cordial, or other flavored liqueurs
- 1 teaspoon instant coffee
